_info.name: Cite-Before-Act MCP (Best Overall — MCP 1st Birthday Hackathon)
_info.description: Security middleware that intercepts any state-mutating MCP tool call and requires human approval before execution. Supports OS dialogs, Slack, Teams, Webex, or CLI fallback. Built on FastMCP.

cite-before-act.description: Safety middleware — intercepts mutating tool calls, shows preview, waits for human approval before executing
